name: Warp.js (SVG Wave Distortion)
description: Lightweight SVG path warping — distort any SVG shape or text with sine waves, noise or custom functions. Animates continuously. Perfect for organic logos, wavy dividers and morphing blob shapes without WebGL.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/warp.js@0.1.0/dist/warp.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof Warp === 'undefined') return;

  // Warp any SVG element with class .warp-svg
  document.querySelectorAll('.warp-svg').forEach(function(el) {
    var warp = new Warp(el);
    warp.interpolate(4);
    var offset = 0;
    (function animate() {
      offset += 0.5;
      warp.transform(function(x, y) {
        return [x, y + 6 * Math.sin(x / 40 + offset * 0.04)];
      });
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    })();
  });

  // Warp wave divider — add class .warp-divider to an <svg> between sections
  document.querySelectorAll('.warp-divider').forEach(function(el) {
    var warp = new Warp(el);
    warp.interpolate(8);
    var t = 0;
    (function animate() {
      t += 1;
      warp.transform(function(x, y) {
        return [x, y + 10 * Math.sin(x / 60 + t * 0.03)];
      });
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    })();
  });
})();
</script>
